requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for Austria PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——奥地利光伏逆变器
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——奧地利光伏逆變器

summary.en: For Austrian solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. Austrian Standards International (ASI) is the national standards body; E-Control oversees the energy sector; APG and regional Austrian DSOs control the practical grid-connection interface. Project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals in German, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Austria is a landlocked, central-European market with alpine conditions in many regions — safety files should address relevant enclosure ingress protection, temperature range (including cold/altitude derating where applicable), and surge protection for grid-connected PV. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU and conformity with OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules are required alongside EU directives.
summary.zh: 对于奥地利太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。奥地利标准国际（ASI）是国家标准机构，E-Control监管能源行业，APG及地区奥地利DSO控制实际并网接口。项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、德语安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。奥地利是欧洲中部内陆市场，许多地区具有高山条件——安全文件应说明外壳防护等级、温度范围（包括适用时的低温/高海拔降额）及并网光伏的浪涌保护。须满足低电压指令2014/35/EU下的CE标志要求及OVE（奥地利电工协会）电工技术规则。
summary.zht: 對於奧地利太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。奧地利標準國際（ASI）是國家標準機構，E-Control監管能源行業，APG及地區奧地利DSO控制實際併網介面。項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、德語安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。奧地利是歐洲中部內陸市場，許多地區具有高山條件——安全文件應說明外殼防護等級、溫度範圍（包括適用時的低溫/高海拔降額）及併網光伏的浪湧保護。須滿足低電壓指令2014/35/EU下的CE標誌要求及OVE（奧地利電工協會）電工技術規則。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
ASI standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules for Austria
E-Control and APG project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for alpine conditions, temperature range, altitude derating, surge protection, and earthing

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Austrian projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals in Chinese, surge protection and 220/380 V assumptions, while Austrian project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions, OVE requirements, and German-language documentation.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为奥地利项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、中文标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而奥地利项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件、OVE要求及德语文件。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為奧地利項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、中文標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而奧地利項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件、OVE要求及德語文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Austrian IEC safety expectations or LVD 2014/35/EU CE-marking requirements. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals are in German for the Austrian market, document protection coordination and earthing per OVE rules, and add environmental evidence for altitude derating, cold-temperature operation, surge protection, and ingress protection relevant to Austrian alpine and lowland installation conditions. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Austria can require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足奥地利IEC安全要求或低电压指令2014/35/EU的CE标志要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册已提供德语版本，按OVE规则记录保护配合和接地，并补充奥地利高山和低地安装条件下相关的高海拔降额、低温运行、浪涌保护和外壳防护证据。针对奥地利对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足奧地利IEC安全要求或低電壓指令2014/35/EU的CE標誌要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊已提供德語版本，按OVE規則記錄保護配合和接地，並補充奧地利高山和低地安裝條件下相關的高海拔降額、低溫運行、浪湧保護和外殼防護證據。針對奧地利對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU required for EU market access; IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence is the standard safety evidence package expected by Austrian project owners, ASI, E-Control, APG, and OVE; German-language documentation is commonly required
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Austria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Austrian PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, align labels and manuals to German for Austrian installations (230/400 V 50 Hz — voltage is higher than China's 220/380 V), document altitude/cold-temperature derating, earthing, and surge protection for Austrian conditions, and confirm OVE requirements. Verify current ASI, E-Control, APG, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 奥地利光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，将奥地利安装的标签和手册对应为德语版本（230/400 V、50 Hz——电压高于中国220/380 V），记录奥地利条件下的高海拔/低温降额、接地和浪涌保护，并确认OVE要求。出货前请核实现行ASI、E-Control、APG及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奧地利光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，將奧地利安裝的標籤和手冊對應為德語版本（230/400 V、50 Hz——電壓高於中國220/380 V），記錄奧地利條件下的高海拔/低溫降額、接地和浪湧保護，並確認OVE要求。出貨前請核實現行ASI、E-Control、APG及項目業主安全要求。
